title: hyoscyamus niger proles agrestis
intro: Hyoscyamus niger proles agrestis, also known as wild henbane, is a subspecies of the henbane plant (Hyoscyamus niger) that grows in the wild. This plant contains tropane alkaloids, which have medicinal properties, including analgesic, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of wild henbane include relief from muscle spasms, pain, and anxiety, as well as its potential use in treating insomnia and epilepsy. In herbal preparations, wild henbane is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be carefully monitored due to its potential toxicity and side effects.
